name: Kilvey Hill (Swansea)
highlights: Skyline city hill with the whole of Swansea Bay laid out below the trig point.
points_of_interest: Kilvey Hill summit cross; former copper-works spoil
viewpoints: Swansea Bay, Mumbles lighthouse, Gower, even Exmoor on clear days
food_drink_nearby: Queen's Hotel Swansea; Gower Brewery tap
hazards_notes: Mountain bikers on shared tracks; exposed in wind
